title: peraxilla haastii
intro: Peraxilla haastii, also known as the Kawakawa or New Zealand pepper tree, is a small, flowering plant native to New Zealand. Traditionally, the leaves of Peraxilla haastii have been used in herbal medicine, particularly for their analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Kawakawa are believed to have various health benefits, including pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved digestion. Kawakawa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for use in herbal remedies.
